parameters: CallEvent 3, Page 1
MessageRows 1
\>Stand in front of \c[4]Mr. Albert\c[0] to start the \c[6]Event\c[0].
MessageRows 4
\c[2]Mr. Albert:\c[0]
Get lost before I call security!

\c[2]Mr. Albert:\c[0]
I can't believe it! How are you here?

\c[2]Mr. Albert:\c[0]
You have 10 seconds to leave before I call security.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Please, Mr. Albert, All I need is a minute of your time.

\c[2]Mr. Albert:\c[0]
A minute? I'm not going to spend a second with a traitor like you.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Please, I'm begging you! For the old time's sake.

\c[2]Mr. Albert:\c[0]
You know what? I'm in a pretty good mood today.

\c[2]Mr. Albert:\c[0]
So I will hear you out.

\c[2]Mr. Albert:\c[0]
Although I have a pretty good idea why you are here.

\c[2]Mr. Albert:\c[0]
But before we start, let me do one more thing.

\c[2]Mr. Albert:\c[0]
Sarah, come to my office.
var key = [5, 4, 'A']
$gameSelfSwitches.setValue(key, true);

\c[4]Sarah:\c[0]
You need something, sir?

\c[2]Mr. Albert:\c[0]
Can you tell me what your job is here?

\c[4]Sarah:\c[0]
My job? Umm...I'm your secretary, sir. I do whatever you ask me to do.

\c[2]Mr. Albert:\c[0]
And making sure that no one can enter my office without an appointment is also part of your job?

\c[4]Sarah:\c[0]
Yes, sir.

\c[2]Mr. Albert:\c[0]
Then can you care to explain what she is doing here?
(\c[23]The girl looked very anxious.\c[0])

\c[4]Sarah:\c[0]
I'm very, very sorry, sir. I was in the restroom for a minute, and she probably came here then.

\c[4]Sarah:\c[0]
I'll immediately call security to escort her out.

\c[2]Mr. Albert:\c[0]
That won't be necessary.

\c[2]Mr. Albert:\c[0]
It's not your job anymore. You are fired.

\c[4]Sarah:\c[0]
No! Please, don't do this!

\c[4]Sarah:\c[0]
I promise I won't make any more mistakes.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Mr. Albert, please, It's not her fault. Don't fire her.

\c[2]Mr. Albert:\c[0]
I suggest you keep your mouth shut. Unless you want me to throw you out too.

\c[2]Mr. Albert:\c[0]
And you worked for me long enough to know that begging won't do you any good.

\c[2]Mr. Albert:\c[0]
So pick up your stuff and get out.
var key = [5, 4, 'A']
$gameSelfSwitches.setValue(key, false);
\>The girl knew it very well. So she left the room without
\>saying another word.
\>Jane could see that she was trying her best not to cry.
\>It was almost like a deja vu, reminding her of the time she
\>got fired.
\>She also felt very guilty.
(\c[3]Jane:\c[23] I just cost another girl her job.\c[0])
(\c[3]Jane:\c[23] I don't know if I could forgive myself for that.\c[0])

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Did you have to do that?

\c[2]Mr. Albert:\c[0]
Yes, I do. To show you that our choices have consequences.

\c[2]Mr. Albert:\c[0]
Sometimes it affects you, and sometimes it affects someone else.

\c[2]Mr. Albert:\c[0]
You, of all people, should have already known that.

\c[2]Mr. Albert:\c[0]
Or did you forget why you lost your job in the first place?

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
How can I?

\c[2]Mr. Albert:\c[0]
Then I guess you haven't learned your lesson yet.

\c[2]Mr. Albert:\c[0]
Anyway, enough chit-chat.

\c[2]Mr. Albert:\c[0]
Tell me why you are here?

\c[2]Mr. Albert:\c[0]
Although I think I know it already.

\c[2]Mr. Albert:\c[0]
It is about the lawsuit, isn't it?

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Yes, it is.

\c[2]Mr. Albert:\c[0]
Then we have nothing to talk about.

\c[2]Mr. Albert:\c[0]
I'm not going to withdraw it.

\c[2]Mr. Albert:\c[0]
And your begging won't work either.

\c[2]Mr. Albert:\c[0]
As I just demonstrated earlier.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Come on, Mr. Albert, I'm sure we can come to a reasonable agreement.

\c[2]Mr. Albert:\c[0]
Alright, I'm listening.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Maybe I can work for you for free until my debt pays off.

\c[2]Mr. Albert:\c[0]
Haha, don't make me laugh. Do you really think I will hire you after you stole from me?

\c[2]Mr. Albert:\c[0]
I'm not even letting you come near my company.

\c[2]Mr. Albert:\c[0]
You see, there is nothing valuable you can offer me.

\c[2]Mr. Albert:\c[0]
Accept for maybe...
(\c[23]He looked at her as if scanning her entire body.\c[0])

\c[2]Mr. Albert:\c[0]
Except for you.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
What do you mean?

\c[2]Mr. Albert:\c[0]
Well, you are pretty hot.

\c[2]Mr. Albert:\c[0]
If you can please me, then maybe we can come to an agreement after all.
(\c[23]Jane was so shocked hearing this that she lost her voice for a moment.\c[0])
(\c[23]She couldn't believe a CEO of a multi-billion bucks company would ask her something like this.\c[0])

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
How dare you suggest something like this!

\c[2]Mr. Albert:\c[0]
I'm not suggesting anything.

\c[2]Mr. Albert:\c[0]
I'm just telling you what you can offer me.

\c[2]Mr. Albert:\c[0]
So unless you have something else of value, I suggest you fuck off.
(\c[3]Jane:\c[23] Why do I keep finding myself in those situations!\c[0])
(\c[3]Jane:\c[23] I know what he wants from me.\c[0])

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
If I "Please" you, will you drop the lawsuit against me?

\c[2]Mr. Albert:\c[0]
Umm...Yeah, sure.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
And I'm guessing, by "please" you mean I have to have sex with you?

\c[2]Mr. Albert:\c[0]
I would have loved to have sex with you, but I don't have time.

\c[2]Mr. Albert:\c[0]
I have a meeting in 15 minutes, so why don't you just blow me?

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
And you will drop the lawsuit?

\c[2]Mr. Albert:\c[0]
Yep.
(\c[3]Jane:\c[23] I'm not buying it.\c[0])
(\c[3]Jane:\c[23] There is no way he will drop the lawsuit just because I blow him.\c[0])

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
How stupid do you think I'm?

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Besides, you don't have a solid case against me anyway.

\c[2]Mr. Albert:\c[0]
Oh, you think so?! Please do explain.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Well, for one thing, the only "evidence" you have on me is the video footage of me "Stealing" some documents.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
I'm using the word "steal" very loosely here because I could've just taken out those documents on your order.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
This video footage alone is not enough evidence to prove my guilt.

\c[2]Mr. Albert:\c[0]
And what makes you think winning is my goal here?

\c[2]Mr. Albert:\c[0]
I will bring multiple allegations against you.

\c[2]Mr. Albert:\c[0]
And you know how our court system works. It will take years before anything is proven.

\c[2]Mr. Albert:\c[0]
I have an army of lawyers and an infinite amount of money to keep the case going.

\c[2]Mr. Albert:\c[0]
But can you do the same?

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
So you just want to keep harassing me!

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Why?! What good will it do to you?

\c[2]Mr. Albert:\c[0]
It will give me immense satisfaction knowing bitch like you got what you deserve.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
You are a sick man!

\c[2]Mr. Albert:\c[0]
Am I, though? I built this company from the ground up, and it means everything to me.

\c[2]Mr. Albert:\c[0]
What would you do if someone came after something you love?

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
How can you act like I am the bad guy!

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
You are the one making shady business deals.

\c[2]Mr. Albert:\c[0]
You know what? This conversation is over. I suggest you leave my building immediately unless you want my security to drag you out.
(\c[3]Jane:\c[23] There is nothing I can do to change his mind. I should just leave.\c[0])

parameters: BG_GRN Boss Office

\>\c[14]Mr. Albert:\c[0]\<
What’s she doing here?

\>\c[2]Samantha:\c[0]\<
She's my friend.

\>\c[14]Mr. Albert:\c[0]\<
Oh, please. You just happened to befriend the woman I fired? You think I’m that stupid?

\>\c[2]Samantha:\c[0]\<
Honestly? Yes. But I’m not here to debate your intelligence—or lack of it. Let’s get to the point.

\>\c[14]Mr. Albert:\c[0]\<
I know why you’re here. You’re not getting a dime more than we agreed on. End of story.

\>\c[2]Samantha:\c[0]\<
Fine.
Acc_Right_PhoneDisplay_Template
(\c[23]She pulls out her phone.\c[0])

\>\c[2]Samantha:\c[0]\<
Take a look at this.

\>\c[14]Mr. Albert:\c[0]\<
What am I looking at?

\>\c[2]Samantha:\c[0]\<
Something that might change your mind.

\>\c[14]Mr. Albert:\c[0]\<
What is this nonsense?
Acc_Left_PhoneDisplay_Template
(\c[23]He snatched the phone from her hand.\c[0])

\>\c[14]Mr. Albert:\c[0]\<
What's this? A video?

\>\c[2]Samantha:\c[0]\<
Yes. Hit play.
Acc_Left_PhoneDisplay_Template
Acc_Left_PhoneDisplay_AQR0302
Acc_Left_PhoneDisplay_AQR0301
(\c[23]He started the clip.\c[0])
(\c[23]As soon as he realized what this was, his expression changed.\c[0])

\>\c[14]Mr. Albert:\c[0]\<
What the hell?! How did you get this?!

\>\c[14]Mr. Albert:\c[0]\<
Is this the hotel I was staying in the other day?!

\>\c[14]Mr. Albert:\c[0]\<
You! You set this up, didn’t you? Planted cameras in my room! You fucking bitch! I'm gonna...
(\c[23]He glared at Jane.\c[0])

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
What are you gonna do, Albert? Ruin my life? Too late—you already did that. Now it’s my turn.

\>\c[14]Mr. Albert:\c[0]\<
So what’s your plan? Leak it? Smear my name?

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
You catch on pretty quick.

\>\c[14]Mr. Albert:\c[0]\<
You think that would be enough?

\>\c[14]Mr. Albert:\c[0]\<
It’s not like I was doing anything illegal.

\>\c[14]Mr. Albert:\c[0]\<
My wife and I are separated. I can sleep with whoever I want.

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
I don’t think the public will see it that way.

\>\c[14]Mr. Albert:\c[0]\<
Public perception can be changed. I have a very well paid PR team for that.

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
Really? You think your PR team can explain why you tied me up and let some staffer fuck me?

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
I didn’t sign up for that—escort or not, that’s assault.

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
Really? You think your PR team can explain why you blackmailed a hotel staff into having sex with you?

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
And it’s not just going to end with just this video.

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
I’m sure there’s plenty of other girls you took advantage of.

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
Girls too scared to speak, thinking nobody would believe them.

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
But now that there’s actual evidence of your abuse, People would believe them over you.

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
You still think your fancy PR team can handle all that?
(\c[23]A heavy silence settles. Mr. Albert’s jaw tightens, but he says nothing.\c[0])

\>\c[2]Samantha:\c[0]\<
Looks like you’re out of moves, Albert. You know what you need to do.

\>\c[14]Mr. Albert:\c[0]\<
What do you want?

\>\c[2]Samantha:\c[0]\<
What I’ve always wanted: my fair share.

\>\c[14]Mr. Albert:\c[0]\<
Half of everything I’ve built?

\>\c[2]Samantha:\c[0]\<
Call it what you want. I earned it, after putting up with you and your filth all these years.

\>\c[14]Mr. Albert:\c[0]\<
Fine. You’ve got me cornered.

\>\c[14]Mr. Albert:\c[0]\<
But you’ll both regret this—I’ll make damn sure of it.

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
Still barking, huh? Forgot who’s holding the leash? One wrong move, and this video goes viral.

\>\c[2]Samantha:\c[0]\<
She’s right.

\>\c[14]Mr. Albert:\c[0]\<
Screw you both!

\>\c[2]Samantha:\c[0]\<
If you are done throwing tantrums, can I continue?

\>\c[14]Mr. Albert:\c[0]\<
I’ve already agreed to your demand. What more do you want?

\>\c[2]Samantha:\c[0]\<
Step down as a CEO and resign from the board.

\>\c[14]Mr. Albert:\c[0]\<
What?! You want me to leave my own company?

\>\c[2]Samantha:\c[0]\<
It’s going to happen one way or another. There are many on the board that don’t like the way you do things.

\>\c[2]Samantha:\c[0]\<
With their help and half your shares in my hands, I can force you out. I’m just offering you a dignified exit.
(\c[23]He fumed, fists clenched, but the fight’s draining out of him.\c[0])

\>\c[2]Samantha:\c[0]\<
So, do we have an agreement?

\>\c[14]Mr. Albert:\c[0]\<
Like I have a choice.

\>\c[2]Samantha:\c[0]\<
That’s right, you don’t.

\>\c[2]Samantha:\c[0]\<
Go to the conference room, call your lawyer. I’ll get mine. Let’s wrap this up.
$gameSelfSwitches.setValue([5, 2, 'A'], true)
(\c[23]He storms out without another word.\c[0])
BG_GRN Boss Office

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
That went better than expected.

\>\c[2]Samantha:\c[0]\<
Thanks to you. I couldn’t have faced him down without you here.

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
Well, I’ve got a lot of experience dealing with assholes like him.

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
Sorry, I called your husband an asshole.

\>\c[2]Samantha:\c[0]\<
Soon-to-be ex-husband. Call him whatever you like—I don’t care.

\>\c[2]Samantha:\c[0]\<
Anyway, time to start the divorce settlement. The sooner it’s done, the sooner I’m free.

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
Need me for anything else?

\>\c[2]Samantha:\c[0]\<
No, I’ve got it from here. I’ll call you when it’s over.

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
Cool. Catch you later.
